---
title: "CV"
---

## Education

- PhD in Labour Economics  
- MSc in Social Policy  

---

## Academic Positions

- Hacettepe University – Associate Professor  

---

## Research Areas

- Labour Economics  
- Social Policy  
- Social Entrepreneurship  

---

## Skills

- R, Python  
- Data Analysis  
- Econometrics  

---

## Languages

- Turkish (Native)  
- English (Advanced)  
- Spanish (A1)
